name: arcanon
description: Cross-repo service dependency scanner for Claude Code — maps your architecture, detects drift, and syncs to Arcanon Hub

api_token.title: Arcanon Hub API key
api_token.description: Bearer token starting with arc_. Get one at https://app.arcanon.dev/settings/api-keys

hub_url.title: Arcanon Hub URL
hub_url.description: Base URL of the Arcanon Hub API. Defaults to https://api.arcanon.dev

auto_upload.title: Auto-upload scans to hub
auto_upload.description: Upload scan findings to Arcanon Hub automatically after every /arcanon:map. Requires api_token.

project_slug.title: Hub project slug
project_slug.description: Project slug on Arcanon Hub (only required when using an org-scoped API key).
